svg.title: DYAD Margo DTL data transfer sequence
svg.desc: Shows the Margo backend sequence: consumer packs its Margo server address into the Flux RPC, producer unpacks and resolves the address, then initiates an RDMA pull by sending a Margo RPC to the consumer Margo server, which pulls data directly from the producer buffer.
svg.text: Consumer runs Margo in MARGO_SERVER_MODE. Producer connects back to consumer and triggers RDMA pull.
